# VectorAdd assembly dump

config: ptx_h2_v8_noalloc
size: 1024x1024
raw PTX: /home/henrylhtsang/cute-exercise/cute_exercise/ex29_best_vector_add/dump/ptx_h2_v8_noalloc_1024.ptx
raw SASS: /home/henrylhtsang/cute-exercise/cute_exercise/ex29_best_vector_add/dump/ptx_h2_v8_noalloc_1024.sass

## PTX

```ptx
//
// Generated by NVIDIA NVVM Compiler
//
// Compiler Build ID: CL-36699951
// Cuda compilation tools, release 13.1, V13.1.66
// Based on NVVM 21.0.0
//

.version 9.1
.target sm_100a
.address_size 64

	// .globl	kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0

.visible .entry kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0(
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0_param_0[8],
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0_param_1[8],
	.param .align 8 .b8 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0_param_2[8],
	.param .u32 kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0_param_3
)
.reqntid 256, 1, 1
{
	.reg .pred 	%p<3>;
	.reg .b32 	%r<56>;
	.reg .b64 	%rd<14>;

	ld.param.b64 	%rd5, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0_param_0];
	ld.param.b64 	%rd6, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0_param_1];
	ld.param.b64 	%rd7, [kernel_cutlass_kernel_cute_exerciseex29_best_vector_addkernelVectorAdd_object_at__tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align16_o_409625614096_tensorptrf16_gmem_align_0_param_2];
	mov.u32 	%r55, %ctaid.x;
	setp.gt.u32 	%p1, %r55, 255;
	@%p1 bra 	$L__BB0_3;
	mov.u32 	%r5, %tid.x;
	mul.wide.u32 	%rd1, %r5, 16;
	mov.u32 	%r2, %nctaid.x;
$L__BB0_2:
	shl.b32 	%r54, %r55, 12;
	cvt.s64.s32 	%rd11, %r54;
	add.s64 	%rd12, %rd11, %rd1;
	shl.b64 	%rd13, %rd12, 1;
	add.s64 	%rd8, %rd5, %rd13;
	add.s64 	%rd9, %rd6, %rd13;
	add.s64 	%rd10, %rd7, %rd13;
	// begin inline asm
	ld.global.L1::no_allocate.v8.u32 {%r6, %r7, %r8, %r9, %r10, %r11, %r12, %r13}, [%rd8];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	ld.global.L1::no_allocate.v8.u32 {%r14, %r15, %r16, %r17, %r18, %r19, %r20, %r21}, [%rd9];
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r22, %r6, %r14;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r25, %r7, %r15;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r28, %r8, %r16;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r31, %r9, %r17;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r34, %r10, %r18;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r37, %r11, %r19;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r40, %r12, %r20;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	add.rn.f16x2 %r43, %r13, %r21;
	// end inline asm
	// begin inline asm
	st.global.L1::no_allocate.v8.u32 [%rd10], {%r22, %r25, %r28, %r31, %r34, %r37, %r40, %r43};
	// end inline asm
	add.s32 	%r55, %r55, %r2;
	setp.lt.s32 	%p2, %r55, 256;
	@%p2 bra 	$L__BB0_2;
$L__BB0_3:
	ret;

}

```

        /*0000*/                   LDC R1, c[0x0][0x37c] ;
        /*0010*/                   S2R R3, SR_CTAID.X ;
        /*0020*/                   ISETP.GT.U32.AND P0, PT, R3, 0xff, PT ;
        /*0030*/               @P0 EXIT ;
        /*0040*/                   S2R R0, SR_TID.X ;
        /*0050*/                   LDC R2, c[0x0][0x370] ;
        /*0060*/                   LDCU.64 UR4, c[0x0][0x358] ;
        /*0070*/                   LDCU.64 UR6, c[0x0][0x390] ;
        /*0080*/                   LDCU.128 UR8, c[0x0][0x380] ;
.L_x_0:
        /*0090*/                   IMAD.SHL.U32 R4, R3, 0x1000, RZ ;
        /*00a0*/                   SHF.R.S32.HI R5, RZ, 0x1f, R4 ;
        /*00b0*/                   IMAD.WIDE.U32 R4, R0, 0x10, R4 ;
        /*00c0*/                   SHF.L.U32 R21, R4.reuse, 0x1, RZ ;
        /*00d0*/                   SHF.L.U64.HI R20, R4, 0x1, R5 ;
        /*00e0*/                   IADD3 R8, P1, PT, R21.reuse, UR10, RZ ;
        /*00f0*/                   IADD3 R22, P0, PT, R21, UR8, RZ ;
        /*0100*/                   IADD3.X R9, PT, PT, R20.reuse, UR11, RZ, P1, !PT ;
        /*0110*/                   IADD3.X R23, PT, PT, R20, UR9, RZ, P0, !PT ;
        /*0120*/                   LDG.E.NA.ENL2.256 R8, R16, desc[UR4][R8.64] ;
        /*0130*/                   LDG.E.NA.ENL2.256 R4, R12, desc[UR4][R22.64] ;
        /*0140*/                   IMAD.IADD R3, R2, 0x1, R3 ;
        /*0150*/                   HFMA2 R12, R12, 1, 1, R16 ;
        /*0160*/                   IADD3 R16, P0, PT, R21, UR6, RZ ;
        /*0170*/                   HADD2 R13, R13, R17 ;
        /*0180*/                   IADD3.X R17, PT, PT, R20, UR7, RZ, P0, !PT ;
        /*0190*/                   ISETP.GE.AND P0, PT, R3, 0x100, PT ;
        /*01a0*/                   HFMA2 R14, R14, 1, 1, R18 ;
        /*01b0*/                   HFMA2 R4, R4, 1, 1, R8 ;
        /*01c0*/                   HFMA2 R6, R6, 1, 1, R10 ;
        /*01d0*/                   HADD2 R15, R15, R19 ;
        /*01e0*/                   HADD2 R5, R5, R9 ;
        /*01f0*/                   HADD2 R7, R7, R11 ;
        /*0200*/                   STG.E.NA.ENL2.256 desc[UR4][R16.64], R12, R4 ;
        /*0210*/              @!P0 BRA `(.L_x_0) ;
        /*0220*/                   EXIT ;
.L_x_1:
        /*0230*/                   BRA `(.L_x_1);
        /*0240*/                   NOP;
        /*0250*/                   NOP;
        /*0260*/                   NOP;
        /*0270*/                   NOP;
        /*0280*/                   NOP;
        /*0290*/                   NOP;
        /*02a0*/                   NOP;
        /*02b0*/                   NOP;
        /*02c0*/                   NOP;
        /*02d0*/                   NOP;
        /*02e0*/                   NOP;
        /*02f0*/                   NOP;
.L_x_2:

	.section	.nv.shared.reserved.0,"aw",@nobits
	.weak		__nv_reservedSMEM_offset_0_alias
